flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Rush University rose 16% between 2017 and 2020 ($19.0k → $22.0k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Rush University are 13% below 6-year earnings ($86.9k → $75.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Rush University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (118 → 138).
